items.title: Oxford History of Science Museum
items.subtitle: Steampunk: The World's First Museum Exhibition of Steampunk Art
items.description: Oxford University's History of Science Museum hosted the world's first museum exhibition of steampunk art, featuring several of Tom Banwell's original creations.

items.title: Muzeo
items.subtitle: Steampunk: History Beyond Imagination
items.description: Tom's work was featured in the Muzeo exhibit 'Steampunk: History Beyond Imagination'.

items.title: Trapholt Museum
items.subtitle: Fetishism Exhibition
items.description: Tom's work was featured in the 'Fetishism' exhibition at Trapholt Museum in Denmark.

items.title: 30 Seconds to Mars: Hurricane
items.description: The Bunny Mask, Gas Mask, and The Furst plague doctor mask were all featured in the Jared Leto directed short film 'Hurricane'. The band sold these masks with the 30 Seconds to Mars logo on the forehead.

items.title: WGN TV Show: Salem
items.description: The Furst plague doctor mask was featured in the WGN television series 'Salem'.

items.title: Nissan: Blackbird Web Series
items.description: Featuring Giancarlo Esposito (Breaking Bad, The Mandalorian) and Renata Gonzalez in Nissan's award-winning web series.

items.title: LA Opera: Verdi's Two Foscari
items.description: In 2016, Tom designed custom leather masks for the performers of Verdi's Two Foscari by the LA Opera including the Aardvark, Fire Breather, and She Wolf masks.

items.title: Movie: Armynel (2012)
items.description: The Furst plague doctor mask was featured in the 2012 film Armynel.

items.title: Chevelle: La Gargola Album Cover
items.description: Acclaimed rock band Chevelle used our Krankheit Plague Doctor Mask on the cover of their 2014 album La Gargola.

items.title: Ghost BC
items.description: Ghost live performance featuring the Stiltzkin plague doctor mask by Banwell Designs.

items.title: Skrillex & Jared Leto
items.description: Jared Leto sporting the Bunny Mask while chillin with Skrillex as seen in Rolling Stone Magazine.

items.title: Forbes Magazine
items.description: Forbes Magazine published an article about the rise of the plague doctor character in modern culture, featuring a customer wearing a full Banwell Designs Plague Doctor Costume at the Middle East Film & Comic Con in Dubai.

items.title: Vice Magazine
items.description: Featured in Vice Magazine.

items.title: Make Magazine
items.description: Featured in Make Magazine.

items.title: Vogue
items.description: Featured in Vogue.

items.title: Rolling Stone
items.description: Featured in Rolling Stone Magazine.

items.title: Tony Hawk & Black Plague Brewing
items.description: Tony Hawk's 'Tony Hawps' beer featuring a stylized image of Schnabel altered to look like the bird skeleton from Tony Hawk's original Powell Peralta skateboard from 1987.

items.title: Paris Hilton
items.description: Paris Hilton wearing the Raven Mask at Burning Man.

items.title: Giancarlo Esposito
items.description: Featured in the Nissan Blackbird web series.

items.title: Jared Leto
items.description: Featured Banwell Designs masks in 30 Seconds to Mars' Hurricane.

items.title: Black Plague Brewing
items.description: Our Schnabel plague doctor mask was used as the company logo for Black Plague Brewing.

items.title: Revolution Brewing: La Gargola Beer
items.description: In August 2019, with the collaboration of Revolution Brewing, Chevelle announced the release of their Helles Lager beer 'La Gargola' featuring the Krankheit Plague Doctor mask. Revolution Brewing is Illinois' largest independent craft brewery.

items.title: Monterey Bay Aquarium
items.description: Tom's cow gas mask project was featured in the Monterey Bay Aquarium's climate change exhibit.
